title: Are the Preferred Media Diets of Media Users Valuable for a Democratic Public Sphere?
author: Beaufort, Maren
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This study evaluates the extent to which different understandings of democracy are reflected among media users and their expectations of news media. It integrates the user perspective with normative conceptions of democratic media performance grounded in democratic theory, taking seriously that different democratic orientations are associated with distinct patterns of information use.
steps_raw: This study evaluates the extent to which different understandings of democracy are reflected among media users and their expectations of news media. It integrates the user perspective with normative conceptions of democratic media performance grounded in democratic theory, taking seriously that different democratic orientations are associated with distinct patterns of information use.
